title: Supplementary material for journal article "Development of a Novel Tissue Blot Hybridization Chain Re-action for the Identification of Plant Viruses"
author: Filardo, Fiona
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
S1 - is a table of all the viruses used in the development of the TB-HCR method. 

 S2 - is a step by step protocol of how to to TB-HCR 

 S3 - Is a fun stop motion movie explaining the concept and basic procedure 

 S4 - is a stop motion movie of the TB-HCR method using fluorescent hairpins. It shows fluorescence over time after the addition of the hairpins
steps_raw:
S1 - is a table of all the viruses used in the development of the TB-HCR method. 

 S2 - is a step by step protocol of how to to TB-HCR

keywords: TB-HCR, hybridisation chain reaction, plant virus, TYLCV
